original_prompt: 给这套产品穿戴在一个欧洲少女身上，场景圣诞节，要求场景明亮，后面有红色的圣诞树
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
A high-key, festive lifestyle photography shot. A young European girl model is wearing the luxurious bridal jewelry set (the silver tiara with peaked silhouette and central teardrop crystal, the V-shaped deep plunge necklace with pear-shaped pendant, and matching chandelier earrings). She is smiling elegantly, radiating joy. The setting is a bright, upscale interior decorated for Christmas. Directly behind her, slightly out of focus to create depth, stands a unique Red Christmas Tree adorned with silver baubles and twinkling fairy lights. The lighting is bright and airy (high-key lighting), emphasizing the sparkle of the clear crystals against her skin.

[Text & UI Layout]
***Layout Style**: Natural Integration.
Text Rendering Instructions:
1. **Mood Title**: Content: "闪耀圣诞夜" (Sparkling Christmas Eve). Style: [Elegant Serif, Silver or White gradient]. Position: [Top Center or Floating near the shoulder].
2. **Description**: Content: "璀璨光芒，点亮节日奇迹" (Brilliant light, lighting up the holiday miracle). Style: [Clean Sans-serif, smaller].
layout_logic: 建议采用中心构图或三分法构图，将欧洲少女安排在画面主要视觉点。红色的圣诞树作为强烈的背景元素，颜色较重，建议通过景深虚化（Bokeh）处理，避免抢夺前景银色珠宝的视觉焦点。文字应放置在画面较“空”的区域（如纯色背景墙面或虚化的树旁），使用白色或银色字体以呼应珠宝材质。
